title: Set of 2 Reactive Glaze Holly Foliage Christmas Plates | Festive Ceramic Side Plates for Christmas Dining - 22cm
features: FESTIVE HOLLY DESIGN | Bring Christmas charm to your table with these festive side plates, featuring sculpted holly leaves and red berries
HANDMADE & UNIQUE | Crafted from glazed ceramic, each plate has its own one-of-a-kind finish that sparkles with character
VERSATILE FESTIVE USE | Perfect for serving snacks, desserts, or Christmas treats, from appetisers to festive pastries
SEASONAL CENTREPIECE | Works beautifully as a display or dining plate, adding warmth and traditional style to Christmas tables
PERFECT FOR GIFTING | A thoughtful choice for anyone who loves charming handmade festive tableware. Approx 22cm
